name: ai-image-canvas-codex-plugin
description: AI Image Canvas MCP server for image workflows, annotation editing, and skill runs.

interface.shortDescription: Open a board, generate visuals, edit from marks, and run workflows via MCP.
interface.longDescription: AI Image Canvas exposes an English-only MCP surface: tools, resources, and prompts for board lifecycle, mark pipelines, task queues, and workflows.
defaultPrompt: Open the board and make a poster for my product.
Revise the selected visual using my board marks.
AI Image Canvas continue mark edits.
